rulings.Case Title: LYNN R. BARANCO et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION To Compel General Cable To Respond To Special Discovery
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, January 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel General Cable to respond to set four special interrogatories and requests for production and supplemental special interrogatory and requests for production. The parties are to meet and confer regarding the issues raised in the reply papers in an effort to reach agreement. If all issues raised in the reply papers are not resolved before then, by 4:30pm today the parties are required to send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the issues remaining in dispute and then appear at the hearing on January 25 at 9 a.m. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID J. PALOMARES VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: And Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, January 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Tingue, Brown & Co.¿s motion to compel further responses is granted. Plaintiff¿s further amended responses to defendant¿s form interrogatory 17.1 fail to comply with C.C.P. § 2030.230. Plaintiff¿s further amended responses to defendant¿s requests for production numbers 1-5, 9, 15, 16 and 18 fail to comply with C.C.P. § 2031.210(a). Plaintiff is required to serve further responses to these discovery requests within fifteen days. Defendant represents that the verifications issue is moot. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LUISA NICHOLS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Mo For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, January 25, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Defendant The Zippertubing Co.¿s motion to compel plaintiff'S further responses to request for production of documents and to compel plaintiffs' further responses to special interrogatories and motion for sanctions is continued at the parties¿ request to February 2, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. = (220/HEK)
